backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the FIESTA event planning app, defining all data types (UserProfile, Event, Booking, Review, OrganizerProfile, EventPhoto) and persistent storage maps, with role-based access control and blob storage mixins included.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three image rendering pipeline fix features: converting backend Uint8Array blobs to displayable URLs in PortfolioGallery/OrganizerCard, EventPhotoGallery, and a shared imageUtils helper consolidating conversion logic across all upload/gallery components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering pages, hooks, components, and utilities for the FIESTA React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the FIESTA frontend app, mounting the React app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (landing, guest, organizer, admin) wrapped in a Layout that includes Header, Footer, and a conditional ProfileSetupModal for new users.
frontend/src/components/admin/AnalyticsC: Reusable card component for displaying a single analytics metric with an icon, label, value, and optional description.
frontend/src/components/admin/AnalyticsD: Admin analytics dashboard component that fetches organizer and event data to display summary cards for total organizers, total events, most popular event type, and highest-rated organizer.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Authentication button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, clearing the React Query cache on logout and displaying appropriate icons and styling for each state.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: A modal dialog that collects a new user's full name and email to create their profile, using the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation and blocking dismissal until submitted.
frontend/src/components/booking/BookingR: A dialog that lets a guest select one of their existing events and submit a booking request to a specific organizer, then redirects to the bookings page on success.
frontend/src/components/booking/GuestBoo: Renders a list of booking cards for a guest, each fetching and displaying the associated event's details (date, location, guests, style, contact) alongside booking status.
frontend/src/components/booking/Organize: Displays a single booking request card for an organizer, showing event details and providing approve/reject action buttons that call the `useUpdateBookingStatus` mutation.
Renders an organizer's bookings split into 'Pending Requests' and 'Past Bookings' sections, delegating each item to `OrganizerBookingCard`.
frontend/src/components/events/CreateEve: A form for guests to create a new event by selecting type, date, location, style, guest count, and contact number, with past-date validation before calling `useCreateEvent`.
frontend/src/components/events/EventList: Displays a list of event cards showing each event's type, date, location, guest count, style, and contact number formatted from nanosecond timestamps.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: A simple site footer showing the copyright year and a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Sticky navigation header with logo, desktop and mobile nav links (My Events, Find Organizers, My Bookings, Organizer Dashboard), and a LoginButton; links are conditionally shown based on authentication state.
frontend/src/components/organizer/EventP: Read-only photo gallery component that displays event photos in a responsive grid with a keyboard-navigable lightbox for full-size viewing.
Photo management component for organizers that allows uploading new event photos and deleting existing ones, with loading states and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/organizer/Organi: Card component displaying an organizer's portfolio preview images, company info, contact number, badges, and a booking modal trigger; supports selection state for comparison.
Sortable comparison table for multiple organizer profiles showing experience, pricing, rating, and availability, with per-row booking modal support.
Form component for creating or editing an organizer profile (company name, contact, experience, pricing, description, availability), submitting data via the useSaveOrganizerProfile mutation.
Displays a read-only view of an organizer's profile including contact info, experience, pricing, reviews, and a portfolio gallery using Card and Badge UI components.
frontend/src/components/organizer/Portfo: Renders a responsive grid of portfolio images with hover zoom effect and a keyboard-navigable lightbox modal for full-size viewing.
Provides a UI for uploading and deleting organizer portfolio images, using file input, mutation hooks, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the currently authenticated caller's user profile from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login, logout, and status tracking via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposed through a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user profiles, organizer profiles, events, bookings, and portfolio images.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for a navy/gold theme in both light and dark modes, plus utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin-only page that redirects non-admins to the home route and renders the AnalyticsDashboard component for authenticated admin users.
frontend/src/pages/GuestBookings.tsx: Authenticated guest page that fetches and displays the current user's bookings via GuestBookingList, redirecting unauthenticated users to home.
Authenticated guest page showing a two-column layout with a CreateEventForm and an EventList of the user's own events.
frontend/src/pages/GuestOrganizerBrowsin: Authenticated guest page for browsing organizer profiles with multi-select comparison, a lightbox for portfolio images, and keyboard navigation support.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page with a hero section, feature cards, and a CTA section; shows a dashboard button for authenticated users or a login prompt otherwise.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerBookingManag: Authenticated organizer page that lists incoming booking requests via OrganizerBookingList with a back-navigation button to the organizer dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerComparison.t: Authenticated guest page that reads organizer IDs from URL search params and renders a side-by-side OrganizerComparisonTable for the selected organizers.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerDashboard.ts: Authenticated organizer page that conditionally shows a profile creation/edit form or a profile view with portfolio and event photo management sections.
frontend/src/ui/button.tsx: Defines a reusable Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes using class-variance-authority, supporting an asChild prop via Radix UI Slot.
frontend/src/ui/card.tsx: Exports a set of composable Card layout components (Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter, CardAction) built with forwardRef and Tailwind utility classes.
frontend/src/utils/imageUtils.ts: Provides helper functions to convert PortfolioImage filenames, EventPhoto blobs, and ExternalBlob objects into displayable URLs using HTTP, blob:, or data: URL schemes.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors (navy, gold, semantic tokens), fonts, shadows, border radii, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking version, known issues (broken event photo upload/display), and three existing fix features related to consolidating and correcting the image rendering pipeline for portfolio and event photos.
